item.description: There were cheers in the House of Representatives after four Republicans broke from President Donald Trump, joining Democrats to pass a preliminary resolution to stop the war on Iran. The president said a deal with Iran could come soon and that the near-daily exchanges of fire between the United States and Iran and attacks on U.S. allies on the Gulf, are normal. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: House Votes to Restrain Trump’s War Powers
media:content.media:description: There were cheers in the House of Representatives after four Republicans broke from President Donald Trump, joining Democrats to pass a preliminary resolution to stop the war on Iran. The president said a deal with Iran could come soon and that the near-daily exchanges of fire between the United States and Iran and attacks on U.S. allies on the Gulf, are normal. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

item.title: House Votes to Restrain Trump’s War Powers

item.description: President Donald Trump is making changes at the Justice Department, nominating acting attorney general Todd Blanche as its permanent director. Blanche replaced Pam Bondi after her firing and since then has notably investigated several of Trump’s perceived enemies.

media:content.media:title: Trump to Tap Acting AG Todd Blanche to Lead DOJ Permanently
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is making changes at the Justice Department, nominating acting attorney general Todd Blanche as its permanent director. Blanche replaced Pam Bondi after her firing and since then has notably investigated several of Trump’s perceived enemies.

item.title: Trump to Tap Acting AG Todd Blanche to Lead DOJ Permanently

item.dc:creator: Chantal Da Silva
item.description: Marjane Satrapi, the French-Iranian author and illustrator behind the popular graphic novel series and film “Persopolis,” has died, the French presidency said Thursday.

media:content.media:text: 6th "Pluriel.les" Festival - Day One
media:content.media:description: Marjane Satrapi at a film festival in Compiegne, France, in 2023.

media:content.media:text: A still from the animated adaptation of "Persepolis".
media:content.media:description: Marjane Satrapi at a film festival in Compiegne, France, in 2023.

item.title: Marjane Satrapi, French-Iranian author of ‘Persepolis,’ dies at 56

item.dc:creator: Rohan Nadkarni
item.description: When the New York Knicks needed a big basket against the San Antonio Spurs in Game 1 of the NBA Finals, they turned to Jalen Brunson. He delivered.

media:content.media:text: 2026 NBA Finals - Game One
media:content.media:description: Jalen Brunson #11 of the New York Knicks shoots the ball against Stephon Castle #5 of the San Antonio Spurs during the fourth quarter in Game One of the 2026 NBA Finals at Frost Bank Center on June 03, 2026 in San Antonio, Texas.

media:content.media:text: Spurs star Victor Wembanyama reacts during the fourth quarter.
media:content.media:description: Spurs star Victor Wembanyama reacts during the fourth quarter.

item.title: The Knicks’ Jalen Brunson can already do what the Spurs are still figuring out

item.description: Scott Pelley is accusing CBS News editor-in-chief Bari Weiss of not telling the truth about his termination from “60 Minutes,” disputing her claim that leadership attempted to find “a way back” with him. NBC’s Erin McLaughlin reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Scott Pelley Speaks out After His Termination From ’60 Minutes’
media:content.media:description: Scott Pelley is accusing CBS News editor-in-chief Bari Weiss of not telling the truth about his termination from “60 Minutes,” disputing her claim that leadership attempted to find “a way back” with him. NBC’s Erin McLaughlin reports for TODAY.

item.title: Scott Pelley Speaks out After His Termination From ’60 Minutes’

item.dc:creator: Laura Strickler
item.description: A DHS watchdog report revealed that staff members at Winn Correctional Center used a prohibited chokehold to “gain control” of a person being held there and stabbed another in the hand with a pen when an officer could not close the door to a housing unit.

media:content.media:text: ICE Detention Center Louisiana
media:content.media:description: Winn Correctional Center, an ICE detention facility, in Winnfield, La., on April 9.

item.title: DHS watchdog finds use-of-force issues and safety and sanitation concerns at Louisiana ICE center

item.description: New video shows apparent Ukrainian attacks on Russian targets in St. Petersburg during a major economic forum. NBC News' Keir Simmons reports.

media:content.media:title: New video shows apparent Ukrainian attacks on Russian targets in St. Petersburg
media:content.media:description: New video shows apparent Ukrainian attacks on Russian targets in St. Petersburg during a major economic forum. NBC News' Keir Simmons reports.

item.title: New video shows apparent Ukrainian attacks on Russian targets in St. Petersburg

item.dc:creator: Chantal Da Silva
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer said the case would go to the Court of Appeal to be reviewed — but advocates say the initial sentences speak to a wider failing.

media:content.media:text: One of the victims was raped by two boys in an underpass, pictured, after arranging to meet one of them for a date in November 2024.
media:content.media:description: One of the victims was raped by two boys in an underpass, pictured, after arranging to meet one of them for a date in November 2024.

media:content.media:text: Jess Phillips visits West Midlands Police control room
media:content.media:description: One of the victims was raped by two boys in an underpass, pictured, after arranging to meet one of them for a date in November 2024.

media:content.media:text: Million Women Rise march in London
media:content.media:description: One of the victims was raped by two boys in an underpass, pictured, after arranging to meet one of them for a date in November 2024.

item.title: Three boys were found guilty of rape at knifepoint. A U.K. judge let them walk.

item.description: SpaceX has filed for an initial public offering at a valuation of $1.77 trillion that could make founder and CEO Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire. NBC News' Allie Canal has more.

media:content.media:title: SpaceX files for IPO in move that could make Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire
media:content.media:description: SpaceX has filed for an initial public offering at a valuation of $1.77 trillion that could make founder and CEO Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire. NBC News' Allie Canal has more.

item.title: SpaceX files for IPO in move that could make Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire

item.description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

media:content.media:title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final
media:content.media:description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

item.title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final

item.dc:creator: Chloe Atkins
item.description: The arbitrator decided last month that Rozier, who has pleaded not guilty in a sports gambling investigation, breached his obligations to play for the Miami Heat.

media:content.media:text: Rozier Case Motion Basketball
media:content.media:description: Terry Rozier arrives at Brooklyn federal court in New York on April 27.

item.title: Terry Rozier must forfeit most of his $26 million NBA salary, arbitrator rules

item.dc:creator: Janis Mackey Frayer
Nat Sumon
item.description: Through the long days and nights he and four other men were trapped inside a flooded cave, all Mued Duangsomdy could think about was food.

media:content.media:text: Rescuers pull four from flooded cave in Laos
media:content.media:description: Rescued men are welcomed, after seven Lao nationals who had entered a cave to prospect for gold were trapped for more than a week when rising water blocked their exit, in Xaisomboun province, Laos, May 30, 2026, in this screen grab taken from social media video.

media:content.media:text: A man is rescued from a cave in Laos on May 29, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Mued was rescued from the cave Friday.

media:content.media:credit: Metta Tham Kalasin Rescue via Reuters
media:content.media:text: Members of a rescue team work to save seven people trapped in a cave, at a location given as Xaisomboun Province
media:content.media:description: Rescuers have been searching for alternative ways into the cave.

item.title: Laos cave survivor recounts days trapped in dark, flooded cave

item.dc:creator: NBC Chicago
The Associated Press
item.description: New video into the sprawling Obama Presidential Center in Chicago revealed a sneak peek of what the venue will look like.

media:content.media:text: Obama Presidential Center
media:content.media:description: Passersby walk outside the Obama Presidential Center in Chicago.

media:content.media:text: Obama Presidential Center
media:content.media:description: Passersby walk outside the Obama Presidential Center in Chicago.

media:content.media:text: The Press Is Given A Preview Of The Obama Presidential Library
media:content.media:description: Passersby walk outside the Obama Presidential Center in Chicago.

media:content.media:text: The Press Is Given A Preview Of The Obama Presidential Library
media:content.media:description: Passersby walk outside the Obama Presidential Center in Chicago.

item.title: New video offers a sneak peek into the Obama Presidential Center in Chicago

item.dc:creator: David Cox
item.description: New research reveals a mental workaround that is activated through repetition and experience.

media:content.media:text: Businesswoman talking on smart phone at desk
media:content.media:description: Side view of businesswoman talking on mobile phone while working on computer.

item.title: Science reveals people are capable of multitasking — it just requires practice

item.dc:creator: Elmira Aliieva
item.description: Fans heading to games at the World Cup will be banned from taking reusable water bottles into stadiums, a last-minute policy reversal that could add to concerns about heat at this summer’s tournament.“FIFA made the decision to prohibit bottles to prevent risk and injury to players and attendees,” a spokesperson for the global soccer governing body told NBC News in a statement Thursday.

media:content.media:text: Spain v Bulgaria - FIFA World Cup 2026 Qualifier
media:content.media:description: Mikel Oyarzabal of Spain throws a water bottle prior to the FIFA World Cup 2026 qualifier match between Spain and Bulgaria at Jose Zorrilla on October 14, 2025 in Valladolid, Spain.

media:content.media:text: Workers affix FIFA World Cup 2026 logos and signage on a fence outside of SoFi Stadium
media:content.media:description: Workers affix FIFA World Cup 2026 logos and signage at SoFi Stadium in Inglewood, Calif., on May 26.

item.title: FIFA bans fans from taking water bottles into World Cup stadiums, a last-minute reversal

item.dc:creator: Chantal Da Silva
item.description: Marjane Satrapi, the French-Iranian author and illustrator behind the popular graphic novel series and film “Persopolis,” has died, the French presidency said Thursday.

media:content.media:text: 6th "Pluriel.les" Festival - Day One
media:content.media:description: Marjane Satrapi at a film festival in Compiegne, France, in 2023.

media:content.media:text: A still from the animated adaptation of "Persepolis".
media:content.media:description: Marjane Satrapi at a film festival in Compiegne, France, in 2023.

item.title: Marjane Satrapi, French-Iranian author of ‘Persepolis,’ dies at 56

item.dc:creator: Elmira Aliieva
item.description: A flesh-eating parasite that had been kept out of U.S. livestock for decades has been detected in Texas, threatening the nation’s cattle industry and food supply at a time when prices are already high.

media:content.media:text: Screwworm Livestock
media:content.media:description: An adult New World screwworm fly sits in this undated photo.

media:content.media:text: Screwworm Livestock
media:content.media:description: An adult New World screwworm fly sits in this undated photo.

item.title: Flesh-eating screwworm returns to U.S. after 60 years, threatening cattle herd

item.dc:creator: Tim Rohan
item.description: The former striker will serve as a World Cup commentator for Telemundo, the tournament’s official Spanish-language network.

media:content.media:text: Jozy Altidore
media:content.media:description: Jozy Altidore, a former Toronto FC player, delivers the match ball before a match between Toronto FC and Inter Miami CF in Toronto on May 9.

media:content.media:text: United States forward Jozy Altidore (17)
media:content.media:description: Jozy Altidore, a former Toronto FC player, delivers the match ball before a match between Toronto FC and Inter Miami CF in Toronto on May 9.

item.title: Jozy Altidore, now a broadcaster, is bullish on the U.S. making a deep World Cup run

media:content.media:description: Jalen Brunson #11 of the New York Knicks shoots the ball against Stephon Castle #5 of the San Antonio Spurs during the fourth quarter in Game One of the 2026 NBA Finals at Frost Bank Center on June 03, 2026 in San Antonio, Texas.

media:content.media:description: Spurs star Victor Wembanyama reacts during the fourth quarter.

item.title: The Knicks’ Jalen Brunson can already do what the Spurs are still figuring out

item.dc:creator: Kyla Guilfoil
item.description: President Donald Trump will nominate his acting attorney general, Todd Blanche, to be the country’s top prosecutor, he said Wednesday evening.

media:content.media:text: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche Testifies During House Hearing
media:content.media:description: Todd Blanche entered the administration after having been Donald Trump's personal attorney.

item.title: Trump to nominate Todd Blanche to be attorney general

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: We’re tracking the best early Amazon Prime Day 2026 deals live, including discounts on tech, home, beauty, kitchen products and more before the four-day sale begins.

media:content.media:text: Amazon has early Prime Day deals on kitchen, tech, home items and more.
media:content.media:description: Amazon has early Prime Day deals on kitchen, tech, home items and more.

media:content.media:text: Amazon has early Prime Day deals on kitchen, tech, home items and more.
media:content.media:description: Amazon has early Prime Day deals on kitchen, tech, home items and more.

item.title: The 51+ best early Amazon Prime Day 2026 deals you can shop now: Bissell, Le Creuset, Levi’s, and more (live updates)

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Sandals are notoriously not great for lots of walking. These podiatrists-approved sandals have built-in arch support and cushioning to keep you comfortable.

media:content.media:text: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.
media:content.media:description: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.

media:content.media:text: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.
media:content.media:description: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.

item.title: 6 podiatrist-approved sandals to comfortably walk in all summer

item.dc:creator: Bianca Alvarez
item.description: Bar soaps work as effectively as body washes and I rounded up editor-approved picks from Dove, L’Occitane, Avène and more.

media:content.media:text: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.
media:content.media:description: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.

media:content.media:text: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.
media:content.media:description: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.

item.title: Bar soaps vs. body wash — which is best for your skin?

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: Amazon Prime Day 2026 is happening from June 23 to 26, and only Prime members get access. Here’s what you need to know and what’s new about the sale this year.

media:content.media:text: Amazon Prime Day 2026 is happening for four days this June, giving members access to deals earlier than usual and for longer.
media:content.media:description: Amazon Prime Day 2026 is happening for four days this June, giving members access to deals earlier than usual and for longer.

media:content.media:text: Amazon Prime Day 2026 is happening for four days this June, giving members access to deals earlier than usual and for longer.
media:content.media:description: Amazon Prime Day 2026 is happening for four days this June, giving members access to deals earlier than usual and for longer.

item.title: When is Amazon Prime Day 2026? The official dates, plus more about the 4-day sale
